data.body: 3183 held-out validation: 6/6 GREEN after fixing a REAL impl gap the oracle caught: verify-authorship didn't exempt gate-exempt types (identity/session_log/code_review), so any store with an identity always failed the merge-gate (self-defeating). Added _is_gate_exempt_ticket skip to _collect_all. Mutation-confirmed teeth (forced gate exit 0 -> flags-unsigned RED). lint clean. Full suite running. 4b5b DOCS WRITTEN: docs/identity.md (full model: entity/tiers/attribution/authorship/key-rotation-era/Jira-mapping/opt-in-enforcement) + docs/adr/0045-authenticated-identity.md (git-bug-entity + opaque-id-keying + in-band-TOFU decisions) + linked from docs/README.md; docs-index rc=0. Will commit 3183(code)+4b5b(docs) as 2 commits after suite passes.
